name: use_computer
description: Control the computer using an autonomous AI agent. Can browse the web, use desktop apps, run terminal commands, and manage files — full Linux desktop access. Returns a task ID - use get_task_status to check progress.

prompt.description: What to do on the computer (e.g., 'Go to news.ycombinator.com and find the top 3 stories')

url.description: Starting URL to navigate to (optional, defaults to about:blank)

device_id.description: Target device ID from the Tailscale mesh (default: 'blackbox' for local machine). Use list_devices to see available devices.

model.description: Optional. The computer-use model CLASS to run: one of 'opus' (the default), 'sonnet', 'fable', 'gemini', or 'gpt'. The backend provider is DERIVED from the class you pick — you do not choose a backend directly. A concrete model id is also accepted. Omit to use the configured default class.

returns: task_id (string) for async status tracking via get_task_status
